title: × thinoelymus laxus
intro: × Thinoelymus laxus, also known as Thapsia garganica, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Thapsia garganica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve its roots being dried and then used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
